## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `mypy` is clean
- [ ] `pytest` passes (offline, no provider SDKs required)
- [ ] If I touched routing (`policy.py` / `router.py` / integrations), the privacy
      tests still hold and I added a test for any new path
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior or public API changed
